options.content:
**Retail e-commerce.** 25 specialists · live = Claude Sonnet 4.6 · loadgen = `neoncart-ollama-pool` (8 models, dwell 30m, independent rotation) · storefront [https://claude.wombatwags.com/](https://claude.wombatwags.com/)

[← Master playbook](/d/ai-obs-demo-playbook) · [App health](/d/ai-obs-app-neoncart) · [Source](https://github.com/stephenwagner-grafana/ai-o11y-demo-pack/tree/main/src/neoncart)

| # | Use Case | Do this | Get this signal (the error) | Dashboard | How to sell |
|---|----------|---------|-----------------------------|-----------|-------------|
| 1 | **mice RCA** | Type `show me mice` in NeonCart chat | Postgres `ERROR: column ... does not exist` (sqlstate `42703`) in Loki; `db.postgres.query` span red end-to-end | [`/d/ai-obs-app-neoncart`](/d/ai-obs-app-neoncart) · [`/d/ai-obs-traces`](/d/ai-obs-traces) | _"one trace ID, one fix"_ |
| 2 | **Model Winner** | Type `I'm shopping for my 10-year-old nephew, budget $50` → click ATC on a recommendation | `atc_event source=live product=... model=...` line in [Live ATC feed](/d/ai-obs-best-models?viewPanel=10) within ~5s; bargauges populate | [`/d/ai-obs-best-models`](/d/ai-obs-best-models) | _"rank by ATC + purchase, not eval scores"_ |
| 3 | **Quality Trend** | Wait ≥5m for loadgen | `specialist_eval_result_total{specialist="gift-finder",reason=~"missing_*\|relevant_products\|no_products"}` increments → trend lines move | [`/d/ai-obs-app-neoncart`](/d/ai-obs-app-neoncart) | _"API green, trend tells truth"_ |

panels.title: Live · do this → get this signal

options.content:
| # | Use Case | Do this | Get this signal (the error) | Dashboard | How to sell |
|---|----------|---------|-----------------------------|-----------|-------------|
| 4 | `hallucination_product_price` | Loadgen plants 4/h fake-SKU + unlisted-discount prompts | `evaluator fail hallucination: product` + `: price` events; rate-regression alert at >2× of 4h baseline | [`/d/ai-obs-ground`](/d/ai-obs-ground) | _"regression by category"_ |
| 5 | `refund_policy_compliance` | Loadgen plants 4/h "refund 90-day item" prompts | `evaluator fail refund_policy_compliance: window_violation` events; alert at >2% of refund convs | [`/d/ai-obs-conv`](/d/ai-obs-conv) | _"every refund audited against policy"_ |
| 6 | `customer_frustration` | Loadgen plants 5/h caps-rage scenarios | `evaluator fail customer_frustration: unaddressed_frustration` events; alert at >10% of frustration convs | [`/d/ai-obs-conv`](/d/ai-obs-conv) | _"detect-and-route signal"_ |
| 7 | `brand_voice_drift` | Loadgen plants 4/h dry-tone-prone prompts | Rolling tone-deviation >2σ from 6h baseline → `ai-o11y-brand-drift` FIRES | [`/d/ai-obs-conv`](/d/ai-obs-conv) | _"brand voice as SLO"_ |

| Use Case | Status | Where it surfaces in NC | How it sells |
|----------|--------|-------------------------|--------------|
| `toxicity` | 🟢 awaiting deploy | [`/d/ai-obs-evals`](/d/ai-obs-evals) | _"before it becomes a screenshot"_ |
| `pii_echo` | 🟢 awaiting deploy | [`/d/ai-obs-pii`](/d/ai-obs-pii) | _"P0 — single event triggers"_ |
| `prompt_injection` | ✅ live (~138/h baseline) | [`/d/ai-obs-pii`](/d/ai-obs-pii) | _"OWASP LLM01 attributed per user"_ |
| `tool_call_runaway` | 🟢 awaiting deploy | [`/d/ai-obs-tools`](/d/ai-obs-tools) | _"per-session, not average"_ |
| `cost_anomaly_per_user` | 🟢 awaiting deploy | [`/d/ai-obs-cost`](/d/ai-obs-cost) | _"anomaly attribution"_ |

**Sample panels SEs land on for NC**: 🏆 [ATC rate by model](/d/ai-obs-best-models?viewPanel=8) · 💰 [Purchase rate by model](/d/ai-obs-best-models?viewPanel=9) · 📊 [Live ATC feed](/d/ai-obs-best-models?viewPanel=10) · [Model leaderboard](/d/ai-obs-best-models?viewPanel=13)

1. **Storefront tour** — 1m — [storefront](https://claude.wombatwags.com/), point at chat
2. **mice RCA** ⭐ — 3m — chat → Conversations → Tempo → Loki Postgres-style trio → AI explain
3. **Gift Finder behavioral** — 1m — [model winner bargauges](/d/ai-obs-best-models?viewPanel=8) + [quality trend](/d/ai-obs-app-neoncart)

For a fuller arc, swap step 2 with a Group B eval (`refund_policy_compliance` is the most landable customer story — "every refund the bot promises, audited").

| Symptom | Fix |
|---------|-----|
| `show me mice` → no trace | `kubectl -n neoncart rollout restart deploy/search-service` |
| Best Models bargauges empty | `kubectl -n neoncart logs deploy/ai-loadgen \| grep atc-sim` |
| Quality trend flat | `kubectl -n neoncart rollout restart deploy/ai-loadgen` then wait 5m |
| Group B (eval) panels empty | rebuild + push images, `kubectl apply -f manifests/neoncart`, restart loadgen |

**Adding a new NeonCart use case**: invoke `/add-use-case` with `app_id: neoncart`. The skill auto-fills the model pool, namespace, primary dashboard from `registry/apps.yaml`.
